title: ExcellentCrates Virtual Key Placeholder
description: Adds a Placeholder for Virtual Keys from the ExcellentCrates Plugin
body:
## Placeholder Extension Plugin

Adds a simple Placeholder for ExcellentCrates Virtual Keys.

It wasn't possible to display how many virtual keys of a specific type a player
has. This Extension Plugin adds that placeholder. %ec_keyz_[keyID]%

Example:

%ec_keyz_virtualvote% 

Shows only the virtual Vote Keys for the Player for whom the placeholder is parsed.

Returns a simple Number. Only works with Virtual Keys.

Requires PlaceholderAPI and ExcellentCrates!


Made for the StarnixMC Minecraft Server:

> play.starnixmc.fun

> Bedrock Port: 25719

> https://www.youtube.com/@StarnixMC
> 
> https://discord.gg/mxSPg9fxET
